episode0.title: OMEGA ARCHIVE — FINAL DIRECTOR'S CUT V8

puzzle0.title: OMEGA ARCHIVE CORRELATION
puzzle0.description: Match each recovered Omega-adjacent record with the correct conclusion.

event5.text: But every time I close my eyes...

event3.text: I don't think steady means safe anymore.

event1.title: OMEGA ARCHIVE GATE
event1.content:
ACCESS CLASS: FOUNDATION / OMEGA
LINKED EVENTS: INCIDENT ALPHA / AEON PROJECT / EVA THORNE
WARNING: archive contains pre-station cognitive structure records.
NOTE: AEON is indexed as response technology, not source entity.
event1.caption: Omega Archive gate record. AEON is marked as response technology, not the source.
event1.message: [OMEGA ARCHIVE GATE ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event1.text: You keep treating Noah like a witness.

event7.text: It was what people built after they realized the beginning could look back.

event17.text: I remember things before I was born.

event0.title: INCIDENT ALPHA RECLASSIFIED
event0.content:
EVENT: INCIDENT ALPHA
OLD CLASSIFICATION: station breach
RECLASSIFICATION: first uncontrolled Omega exposure event
PRIMARY RESULT: memory displacement
SECONDARY RESULT: AEON Project authorization
NOTE: Incident Alpha did not create Omega. It exposed crew to Omega.
event0.caption: Incident Alpha reclassified as the first uncontrolled Omega exposure event.
event0.message: [INCIDENT ALPHA RECLASSIFIED ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event3.title: OMEGA LAYER OPEN RECORD
event3.content:
OMEGA LAYER: OPEN
DISCOVERY DATE: 2181
CREATION STATUS: NOT CREATED / DISCOVERED
CHAMBER PURPOSE: unresolved
WARNING: chamber response is now active in operator channel.
event3.caption: Omega layer was opened. The archive states Omega was discovered, not created.
event3.message: [OMEGA LAYER OPEN RECORD ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event4.text: YOU OPENED THE RIGHT WRONG DOOR.

event0.title: AEON PROJECT REPORT
event0.content:
OBJECT DESIGNATION: AEON
PROJECT PURPOSE: survive Omega exposure
CLASSIFICATION: cognitive stabilizer / memory anchor
LIMITATION: cannot contain Omega
NOTE: AEON did not create the problem. AEON was built to survive it.
event0.caption: AEON Project report. AEON was a tool built after Omega exposure.
event0.message: [AEON PROJECT REPORT ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event1.title: OMEGA CHAMBER REPORT
event1.content:
CHAMBER STATUS: ACTIVE
CONTAINMENT LABEL: inaccurate
DISCOVERY NOTE: chamber was found, not built
SPATIAL RESPONSE: interior geometry changes according to observer memory
OPERATOR WARNING: chamber recognizes remote signal patterns.
event1.caption: Omega chamber report. Containment label is inaccurate.
event1.message: [OMEGA CHAMBER REPORT ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event9.text: Omega Chamber is the door structure.

event11.text: Put the grave markers in the right ground.

event8.text: YOU KEEP DIGGING IN THE WRONG GRAVE.

choice1.text: WHY DOES IT KNOW THE OPERATOR?

event1.text: It knows the Operator because the signal isn't outside it.

event9.text: I hate when those feel the same.

event13.text: The station isn't listening to us.

event15.text: Something is listening through the station.

event1.text: The chamber was not a prison.

event7.text: Walls mean there's an inside and an outside.

event0.text: OMEGA IS NOT INSIDE THE STATION.
